news.title: Meet the referees for the France-Spain 2026 World Cup Semifinal at Dallas Stadium
news.lede: Soccer Football – FIFA World Cup 2026 – Round of 16 – Switzerland v Colombia – BC Place, Vancouver, Canada – July 7, 2026 Referee Ivan Barton blows his whistle REUTERS/Lee Smith. The 2026 FIFA World Cup wraps up at Dallas Stadium on Tuesday at 2 p.m. when France plays Spain in the first Semifinal. The winner is headed to New York for the final. The loser will play in Miami on Saturday for third place.

news.title: NFL stadium used to stage World Cup begins dramatic overhaul back to football as fans say 'welcome back old friend'
news.lede: AN NFL stadium used at the 2026 World Cup has begun a dramatic overhaul. Fans have welcomed the changes as the NFL stadium prepares for the football season. The World Cup is officially over at Levi’s Stadium. Footage of a sheet covering a Levi’s logo outside the stadium being removed has been shared on social media.

news.title: World Cup scouting report: the lowdown on England’s semi-final opponents Argentina | Nick Ames
news.lede: Defending champions will pose a threat with Messi’s genius but their lack of width and energy in the midfield offers encouragement for Thomas Tuchel. Switzerland knew how to deal with Lionel Messi. They congested the centre of the pitch and made it impossible for him to find angles for threaded passes or rapier finishes. One of Messi’s trademark moves, when the tempo has slowed, is to go through the gears with a quick bounce pass off one of his teammates near the edge of the box.

news.title: International Soccer Powerhouse Compared to Ohio State in 2026 World Cup Race
news.lede: The 2026 World Cup semifinals arrived with a bit of history. France, Argentina, Spain and England, the top four teams in FIFA's rankings, all survived the expanded 48-team field, marking the only time in the tournament's 96-year history that the rankings and the final four have matched exactly. Fox Sports analyst Laken Litman used the occasion to translate the World Cup bracket into college football terms, pairing each semifinalist with a College Football Playoff regular. news.title: The most expensive World Cup 2026 tickets ranked: World Cup Final, $30,000+ tickets, Argentina and more
news.lede: These are the whoppers on the World Cup ticket market right now, going as high as $30,000. The FIFA World Cup has officially returned to North America for the first time since USA '94. Thirty years ago, despite soccer's lower profile in the region, that tournament shattered attendance metrics to become one of the most commercially successful iterations in history. Now, the newly expanded 48-team tournament is deep into its high-stakes knockout stages.

news.title: World Cup kit ranking: Which teams will look best in 2026?
news.lede: While it goes without saying that lifting the FIFA World Cup trophy aloft remains the ultimate prize in soccer, there is a far more important contest taking place among the qualifying nations as we continue to hurtle toward the tournament opener on June 11. Naturally, we are referring to the battle to reign supreme in the style stakes at this summer's tournament in Canada, Mexico and the United States, which is already raging across the continents before a ball has even been kicked.
